text:
Case Management (PCCM) 
programs where the state pays providers a monthly patient management fee of $3.50 for each eligible 
participant under their care. This fee is considered a fixed payment. 

It is very important for states to correctly identify fixed payments. Fixed payments do not have a 
defined “medical record” associated with the payment; therefore, fixed payments are not subject to 
medical record request and medical record review.
